gates.label: RAG hard retrieval gate
details: Generated from the local hard RAG eval suite.
Hybrid vector retrieval uses a deterministic local embedding backend, not provider-backed embeddings.
Artifact is a reproducible regression baseline, not a production-scale benchmark.

gates.label: Provider RAG sample gate
details: Manual live gate for provider-backed embeddings, not a default CI gate.
Estimated embedding cost is configured by the runner, not provider billing.
The sample suite is representative and intentionally smaller than the full suite.

gates.label: Provider live planner gate
details: Planner repeated tool get_company_facts before coverage was sufficient.

gates.label: Compose full E2E
gates.summary: Spring Boot + Python Agent + PGVector + frontend

limitations: Readiness artifact summarizes latest generated gate outputs, not a live service API.
Provider-backed gates remain manual because external providers can be rate-limited.
Compose full E2E is represented by its verification summary, not full container logs.
